title: Raccoon Removal in Plainview, NY | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Plainview, Long Island. Safe, humane removal and exclusion. Licensed experts serving Plainview homes and businesses. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Plainview's residential neighborhoods, seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout this established Long Island community. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services to Plainview homeowners, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges raccoons pose to Plainview properties and deliver effective, lasting results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Plainview and the greater Long Island area for years with proven raccoon removal expertise. Our licensed professionals use safe, humane methods and provide complete exclusion work to prevent future intrusions, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Plainview's tree-lined streets and well-maintained ranch and split-level homes near Old Bethpage Road and the Plainview-Old Bethpage community provide ideal habitats for raccoons seeking food and shelter. Properties near Manetto Hills Park and surrounding wooded areas are particularly susceptible to raccoon activity, especially during nesting season when these animals search for secure den sites in attics and garages.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Plainview?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Plainview typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Plainview neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common throughout Plainview due to the abundance of mature trees, accessible food sources, and residential structures with attics and crawl spaces. They're particularly active near wooded areas and parks, and during spring when mothers seek nesting sites.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Plainview humane?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical trapping and removal methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. We safely relocate raccoons and focus on exclusion techniques to prevent re-entry, ensuring the well-being of both the animals and your family.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Plainview home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Plainview residents in most cases. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. We'll provide a clear timeline during your free inspection and work efficiently to resolve your raccoon problem.
